title: Add Calculator App

requirements.text: Add a Calculator page to the frontend with a fully functional standard calculator supporting addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. The calculator should display a multi-digit input/result screen and a grid of buttons for digits 0–9, decimal point, arithmetic operators (+, −, ×, ÷), equals, clear (C), and sign toggle (+/−) and percentage (%) if applicable. Handle edge cases such as division by zero gracefully.
acceptanceCriteria: A Calculator page is accessible from the app navigation (tab or sidebar entry alongside Disease Directory and Find Pharmacy).
The calculator displays a numeric screen that shows the current input and computed result.
Buttons for digits 0–9, decimal point, +, −, ×, ÷, =, and C are all present and functional.
Chained arithmetic operations produce correct results (e.g., 3 + 5 × 2 follows standard calculator left-to-right evaluation).
Dividing by zero shows a clear error message (e.g., 'Error') instead of crashing.
The calculator UI matches the existing soft green medical theme (white/green palette, card-based layout, sans-serif typography).
The calculator is responsive and usable on both desktop and mobile screen sizes.

constraints: Calculator logic must be frontend-only; no backend changes are required.
Navigation must be extended to include the Calculator page without breaking existing Disease Directory and Pharmacy Finder navigation.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Scientific or advanced calculator functions (sin, cos, log, etc.) unless explicitly requested.
Storing or persisting calculation history in the backend.
Changes to the existing Disease Directory or Pharmacy Finder features.
